items.name: claude-code-recap
items.description: Browse every recent Claude Code session across all your projects and jump back into any of them. Shows project path, summary, git branch, model, turn count, and a ready-to-paste resume command. --open re-opens a whole working set in terminal tabs. Local files only: no network, no telemetry.

items.name: grok-upload-audit
items.description: Agent skill (Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, …) that forensically audits what the xAI Grok Build CLI uploaded from your machine — detects codebase uploads and secret leakage in ~/.grok logs, then generates a checksummed evidence package and a GDPR/CCPA data-deletion request. Secret values never leave your machine.
